calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: K Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:08 p.m.; and concluded at 2:30 p.m.

Jared Bissel, Esq., appeared with and on behalf of Mobile Modular Management Corporation by zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Queensland Builders, Inc. is not present.

Plaintiff Mobile Modular Management Corporation's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on May 10, 2022.
Dismissal as to Defendant Chi Zhang filed on January 24, 2023.
Motion for Default Judgment Prove Up hearing filed and served by mail on June 14, 2023.
Oral motion to dismiss Does 1 - 20 was granted by the Court.
Order Granting to waive witness signed and filed this date.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's Review:

Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Lease Option Change Order signed by Lessee.
Exhibit 3: Container Lease Terms
Exhibit 4: Invoices
Exhibit 5: Demand of Payment letter.
Exhibit 6: Declaration of Sue Huppethal, Director of Credit Collections.
Exhibit 7: Declaration of Jared D. Bissell, Esq.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Mobile Modular Management Corporation and against Defendant Queensland Builders, Inc. as follows:

Damages: $43,804.45
Interest: $ 32,928.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 9,084.00
Costs: $1,294.55
Total: $87,111.00

The Court orders further that a writ of possession be issued in favor of the Plaintiff Mobile Modular Management Corporation, the storage container identified in Agreement No. 210040335 as "Office, 8x20 HCD (Item1035)".

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.
